emails.subject: Re: EOL approvals, 03-26-01
emails.body: Re: EOL approvals, 03-26-01 Lubbock Power &Light to be limited to ERCOT products only since this is a city in Texas and tenor limited to 3 months. Will re-visit if counterparty and Enron wish to. I have spoken to credit who are comfortable with this. Tana Jones@ECT 03/27/2001 08:46 AM

emails.subject: Re: EOL approvals, 03-26-01
emails.body: I take it all the other counterparties on this list cannot transact power since they are restricted by Credit... Marcus Nettelton@ENRON 03/27/2001 02:39 PM
